locale.name: en_US
locale.message: Payment Gateway Settings
Billing
Billing Details
Validation Invoice Document
Verification Failed
The verification link is incomplete or malformed. Please ensure you scan the entire QR code.
The document could not be verified. The link may have been tampered with or has expired.
Letter of Acceptance Verification
Validated LoA Document
Validated Invoice Document
Validated Certificate
Invalid document. The review process for this manuscript has not been completed.
Letter of Acceptance
The document link is invalid or malformed.
Access Denied. You do not have permission to download this manuscript document.
The document (LoA) cannot be issued yet. Please settle the pending invoice below.
Manuscript data or acceptance status not found in the system.
Security verification failed. The document link may have been tampered with.
Certificate of Achievement
The certificate link is invalid or malformed.
Access Denied. This certificate does not belong to you.
The certificate cannot be issued yet because the review task is incomplete.
Certificate data not found.
Billings
Active Invoices
Billing History
Invoice Details
Invalid invoice amount (cannot be negative).
Bundle Payment Package
The system failed to generate the PDF document at this time. Please contact the administrator.
The document link is invalid or malformed.
Security verification failed. The document may have been tampered with.
Invoice not found or you do not have access permissions.
Action rejected. This invoice has already been paid.
The system failed to generate the PDF document at this time. Please contact the administrator.
Invoice cannot be canceled as it may already be paid or you lack the necessary access.
Payment session successfully created.
Invoice successfully canceled.
Shopping Cart
Request method not allowed.
Page session has expired. Please reload and try again.
Your shopping cart is empty. There is nothing to checkout.
Failed to process cart. Please try again later or contact the administrator.
Checkout successful. Your official invoice has been issued.
Virtual Wallet & Loyalty Points
Request method not allowed.
Session has expired. Please reload the page.
Invalid point redemption amount.
Insufficient point balance for this transaction.
Failed to process point exchange. Please contact the administrator.
Points successfully exchanged for a discount coupon.
